pages.raw_text:
The State Federation of Labor
and the Farmers State grange, are
cooperating In an effort to help and
benefit political and other condi.
lions in this state as lney affect
workingmen.


The federation has issued a state
ment to local unions and central
bodies throughout the state ask
ing for the financial and moral sup.
port in the fight of the federation
and the grange for the adoption of
the initiative and referendum
amendment to the state constitu.
ton. The circular also commends
the appropriation by the grange of
funds to carry on the fight to a sue
cessful conclusion and also speaks
highly of the fact that the grange
has started an agitation for the
purchasing of only union made
goods as far as possible by the
farmers.


The officers of the federation
urge upon every local union to join
the federation and assist in bring
ing about better conditions among
the organized and unorganized
workers of the state.
